tasks.subject: Task 1: Fall-through on POST timeout / persisted-5xx + constant bump + 4 tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `process_crawl` no longer raises `FatalError` on POST `TimeoutError` / `URLError` / `OSError` or on persisted 5xx; it falls through to the existing completion poll. New timeout constants accommodate worst-case 20 GB crawl wall-clock. Test suite covers all three fall-through paths.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tools/stash_crawls_batch.py` (imports, constants L150-152, process_crawl L260-317)
- Modify: `tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py` (update test_per_crawl_timeout_formula, add 3 new tests)

**Verify:** `python -m pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v` → 13 passed

**Commits:**
- ab6331a7 — initial implementation, spec compliance PASS
- 4e4d7e89 — quality-review fixes (log str(e), narrow catch tuple, strengthen test 11)

```json:metadata
{"files":["tools/stash_crawls_batch.py","tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m pytest tools/test_stash_crawls_batch.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["narrow catch tuple (URLError, OSError)","_TIMEOUT_MAX=7200","_TIMEOUT_PER_GB=300","process_crawl falls through on POST exception","process_crawl falls through on persisted 5xx after one 30s retry","FatalError still raised on unexpected non-202 2xx / dead-letter / stop / poll deadline","fell_through threaded into poll/done/failed-state strings","log includes type(e).__name__ + str(e)","test_per_crawl_timeout_formula updated for new constants","test 11 verifies retry POST fires (call_count == 2)","13 tests green"]}
```
